name: 15-minute Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into thin strips.
2. Brown the meat in shortening.
3. Add water and mushrooms to the pan.
4. Stir in the onion soup mix until combined.
5. Heat the mixture to boiling.
6. Blend the sour cream and flour together in a separate bowl.
7. Add the blended mixture to the hot saucepan, stirring continuously.
8. Let the sauce thicken before serving.
9. Serve over cooked and drained egg noodles.
